topIssues.title: Improve Display Model (GDI Hooking) to support graphics/symbols and undetected text in legacy apps
topIssues.bodyExcerpt:
### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

The display models of other screen readers, such as JAWS and ZDSR, is able to find text NVDA's display model can't find. This makes a lot of applications that doesn't have accessibillity API support unusable with NVDA, but usable wi

recentComments.author: Emil-18
recentComments.excerpt: @gerald-hartig I did some investigations into the GDI hooking code, and it doesn't seem that hard to fix it so it gets as good as the display models of other screen readers. You don't really need to m

recentComments.author: Emil-18
recentComments.excerpt: @ruifontes You can find it here, as of now, without any improvements to the display model. I don't know how long it is going to take until I have the display model stuff ready. https://github.com/Emil

topIssues.title: Make duration of indentation beeps configurable
topIssues.bodyExcerpt:
### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe

In #18898, the length of indentation beeps was reduced from 80ms to 40ms. However, this can cause problems for some users, such as those using audio cues in VS Code.

### Describe the solution you'd like

Completing the work started
